things.name: Promenade des Anglais
things.description: Famous seafront boulevard stretching 7km along the Baie des Anges

things.name: Vieux Nice
things.description: Baroque old town with colourful facades, bustling markets and narrow alleyways

things.name: Castle Hill
things.description: Hilltop park with panoramic views over the city, coast and port

things.name: Musee Matisse
things.description: Collection of Matisse works in a beautiful 17th-century Genoese villa

things.name: Marche du Cours Saleya
things.description: Famous open-air market for flowers, produce and antiques in the old town

things.name: MAMAC
things.description: Museum of Modern and Contemporary Art with rooftop terrace and garden

things.name: Musee Marc Chagall
things.description: Largest public collection of works by Marc Chagall in a purpose-built museum

things.name: Cimiez
things.description: Aristocratic hilltop quarter with Roman arenas, Matisse and Chagall museums

things.name: Nice Cathedral
things.description: 18th-century Baroque cathedral dedicated to Saint Reparata in the old town

things.name: Monaco Day Trip
things.description: Sovereign city-state with the Casino Monte Carlo and Prince's Palace just 20 minutes away
